sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, text String);
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, text) VALUES (1, 'Hello World!'), (2, 'Goodbye World!');
UPDATE test_strings SET text = replaceOne(text, 'World', 'ClickHouse') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, replaceOne(text, 'ClickHouse', 'Database') AS updated_text FROM test_strings;
DELETE FROM test_strings WHERE text = 'Goodbye ClickHouse!';
